title: AI Transformation Lead
content: - Bridging strategy and execution to lead AI adoption and transformation.
- Designing and deploying LLM-powered systems, AI agents, and scalable architectures that deliver measurable business impact across cloud and enterprise environments.
- Driving AI adoption and transformation across the company, from strategy to execution.
- Mentoring and coaching talented engineers to grow their skills and become leaders in the field of AI.

title: Senior Engineering Manager - Product Development
content: - Leading the Product Development department (3 engineering teams, ~12 engineers) of StorPool
- Drive workflow and processes improvements to support the company's growth in a resilient and scalable manner

title: Head of Engineering
content: - Set up a new department in Bulgaria, overseeing the successful formation of two high-performing teams, totaling 15+ engineers working on API's first digital payout platform, API integrations with partners, and consumer experience.
- Leading operational support improvements through processes and automation, while being an active participant in OPS on-call duty.

- Assumed dual responsibilities of both Head of Engineering and Engineering Management roles, provided strategic leadership and operational oversight to ensure the department's alignment with company goals.

- Led aggressive hiring in a new location, collaborating with HR and leadership to attract top-tier talent, reorganize team structure and build a high-performing engineering team that consistently met quarterly goals.
- Fostered a culture of innovation, collaboration, and excellence, and ensured a positive and productive work environment conducive to professional growth and development.
- Worked closely with product management teams to set the strategy and vision for the department, and aligned engineering efforts with overall company objectives.
- Acted as a key liaison between the Bulgarian division and other company locations, facilitating seamless communication and collaboration to achieve common goals.

title: Engineering Manager
content: - Led a cross-functional team of 10 engineers, including full-stack, front-end, and QA professionals, to deliver top-quality solutions for the company's core products.
- Participated in the leadership team, contributing to the company's roadmap strategy with a focus on technology and engineering.
- Collaborated with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to integrate engineering efforts into the product development lifecycle.
- Fostered a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous improvement, providing mentorship and professional development for team members.
- Shaped the technical direction of the core product, ensuring alignment with business goals and industry best practices.
- Implemented and optimized agile methodologies to enhance team efficiency and product delivery timelines.

title: Robotics Engineering Team Leader / Senior Engineering Manager
content: Robotics Software Team Lead at Ocado Technology Inc., Sofia (Aug 2017 - Dec 2019):
- Led cross-functional teams in developing robotics software for automated warehouses.
- Supported remote teams in the UK, ensuring effective communication and project success.
- Contributed to software development for robotic systems, improving team productivity.
- Implemented methodologies to streamline workflows and boost development efficiency.
- Promoted continuous learning by identifying skill gaps and organizing training programs.
Senior Engineering Manager at Ocado Technology Inc., Sofia (Jan 2020 - Nov 2022):
- Govern overall aspects of the department, with the oversight of end-to-end solutions related to mobile robots.
- Led and mentored team leaders, managing up to 40 indirect reports across Bulgaria, Serbia, and England.
- Facilitated cross-functional collaboration to optimize product development.
- Drove innovation by exploring new technologies to enhance product performance.
- Acted as a liaison to foster communication between engineering and other units.

title: Software Engineer and Team Leader in Automotive Industry
content: I started my career as a software engineer in the automotive industry, working on embedded and application software for vehicle cockpit electronics and battery management systems.
I worked on various projects for various OEMs including BMW, VW, Mercedes, Ford and others.
I spent half of the time in Sofia, Bulgaria and half of the time in Karlsruhe, Germany, working closely to customers and partners in Germany.
In 2016 I moved back to Bulgaria and started working as a team leader for the software development team in the same company.
My last project in automotive was a platform for advanced driving assistance systems (ADAS) and autonomous driving (AD) for Visteon.
